case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICE AG VS. RUTH BOTTEL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICE AG ENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOTTEL, RUTH $1,527.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,582.94 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

A NEW WRIT CAN NOW BE ISSUED. AS TO DEFENDANT BOTTEL, RUTH
